discrepancy_summary.root_cause_summary: TWO INDEPENDENT CRITICAL BUGS: (1) W_ref construction method mismatch (U@V vs direct.randn) (2) dimension swap in sdir_streaming_apply bitmap indexing

wref_construction_comparison.31T_method: rng.randn(896, 4864) * 0.1, single RandomState per layer, seeds {0,43,44,45,46,47}
wref_construction_comparison.conclusion: W_ref are COMPLETELY DIFFERENT matrices — NOT comparable

bitmap_indexing_bug.bitmap_access_stride: should be out_dim=4864 per row, code uses in_dim=896
bitmap_indexing_bug.impact: Accesses wrong bitmap positions, causing Y_delta corruption

quantization_scale.impact: Different W_low representation, compounding W_ref mismatch

X_activation.impact: Different approximation targets, not directly comparable

direct_vs_manifest_comparison.conclusion: Stream path produces materially different output than dense path (bug in sdir_streaming_apply)

root_cause_ranking.cause: sdir_streaming_apply dimension swap bug in bitmap indexing
root_cause_ranking.location: phase31x_manifest_runtime.py, sdir_streaming_apply, line: if bitmap[row * in_dim + col]
root_cause_ranking.fix: Change to: if bitmap[row * out_dim + col]
root_cause_ranking.severity: CRITICAL — corrupts Y_delta direction and magnitude
root_cause_ranking.evidence: Tiny example fails: Y_stream=[0,4,11] vs Y_dense=[5,7,9]. Real layer0: stream norm=382 vs dense norm=702, cosine=0.65.

root_cause_ranking.cause: W_ref construction method completely different from 31T
root_cause_ranking.fix: Use same W_ref construction as 31T: rng.randn(896, 4864) * 0.1 with seeds {0,43,44,45,46,47}
root_cause_ranking.severity: CRITICAL — makes any 31Y approximation quality claim incomparable to 31T
root_cause_ranking.evidence: W_ref norms differ 20x (208 vs 4400), rank differs (896 vs 448), cosine between W_ref ~0 (orthogonal)

reasons: sdir_streaming_apply bitmap indexing bug causes Y_delta corruption (cosine stream vs dense = 0.65, not 1.0)
W_ref construction incompatibility makes 31Y cos_sub incomparable to 31T baseline
MAE_sub ~7500-8100 indicates catastrophic error accumulation from dimension swap bug
required_fixes: Fix sdir_streaming_apply: bitmap[row * in_dim + col] → bitmap[row * out_dim + col]
Use 31T W_ref construction method (direct rng.randn, same seeds) instead of U@V decomposition
Use same quantization scale divisor (7.0 not 7.5)
After fixes, re-run Phase 31Y sweep and verify: (a) stream=dense within tolerance, (b) W_ref matches 31T baseline

do_not_claim: DO NOT claim 31Y produces ~0.995 cos_sub like 31T — this is false
DO NOT claim Phase 31Z represents progress over Phase 31T
DO NOT claim the manifest runtime approximation is working correctly
DO NOT freeze Phase 31Z until both bugs are fixed and reconciled
